images.title: Edge of Ascent
images.gear: OLYMPUS CORPORATION E-M1MarkIII, M.100-400mm F5.0-6.3 + MC-20
images.field_notes: As the Egret departs, it feels like it is falling. Although it does briefly descend, this is all done in order for it to take to the sky.

images.title: Chilean Coast
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1, OLYMPUS M.17mm F1.8
images.field_notes: A cliff and the ocean always seem to make sense. Looking down on the beach far below, and seeing the waves roll in, I can practically taste the salty air.

images.title: End of the Cape
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1, OLYMPUS M.150-400mm F4.5
images.field_notes: The last bit of Cape Cod. The stillness can be felt through this photo.

images.title: Garden Bridge
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-3, OLYMPUS M.75mm F1.8
images.field_notes: While in the Japanese Garden this bridge seemed to beckon for its photo to be taken.

images.title: Dissolving Coast
images.gear: OM Digital Solutions OM-1, OLYMPUS M.150-400mm F4.5
images.field_notes: On the cliffs above, looking down to where the water broke against the rocky shore. The slow shutter speed lets the water soften over the sharp rocks, yet can’t stop the erosion over time.
